title: SaaS Churn Rate Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate customer churn rate and revenue churn rate for your SaaS business, instantly in your browser.
shortDescription: Calculate customer and revenue churn rate over a given period.

guideSections.heading: Why Customer Churn and Revenue Churn Tell Different Stories
guideSections.body: Losing 10% of customers sounds uniformly bad until you check which 10% — if the churned accounts were your smallest plans, revenue churn can be meaningfully lower than customer churn, and vice versa if you lost a few large accounts. Tracking both numbers separately surfaces which one actually deserves attention.

guideSections.heading: Why Churn Rate Needs a Fixed Time Period to Mean Anything
guideSections.body: A churn rate without a stated period — monthly, quarterly, annual — is not comparable to any benchmark, since a 5% monthly churn rate compounds to a dramatically worse annual figure. Always pair a churn number with the period it was measured over before comparing it against industry standards.
